name: Cosmic Cursor
short_description: Cosmic Cursor fuses simple mouse-based controls with a challenging, reactive bullet hell for the ultimate pick-up-and-play roguelike experience.
detailed_description:
Movement is Life
Use the cursor to dodge and attack enemies when the ship’s weapon is charged

Shop for Upgrades
Shops present many powerful upgrades, but for a price. Be sure to plan ahead!

Survival is Key
Each ship’s weapon has a different way to destroy enemies, learn the best way to use each one!

Unlock New Content
Death is not the end! Upgrade ships after every run to reach their full potential!

Game Features


8 Unique Ships

7 Complex Enemy Types

100+ Upgrade Cards

2 Devastating bosses

18 Challenging Achievements
